seo.title: State Inspection Auto Repair | Dallas Auto Mechanic & State Inspections
seo.description: Trusted auto repair and state inspections in Dallas, TX. Expert mechanics, honest pricing, and fast service. Call (214) 327-4019 today!

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair & State Inspections You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: From check engine lights to full-service maintenance, we keep Dallas drivers safe and on the road.

featureSections.title: Fast & Reliable Texas State Inspections
featureSections.body: We perform official Texas state inspections for all vehicles. Our certified inspectors check brakes, lights, emissions, and more to ensure your car meets state requirements.
bullets: Quick turnaround – most done in under 30 minutes
featureSections.cardBody: We only fail vehicles for genuine safety issues – and we’ll explain exactly what needs fixing.

featureSections.title: Complete Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: From oil changes to engine rebuilds, our ASE-certified technicians handle it all. We use quality parts and provide upfront pricing.
featureSections.cardBody: We never upsell unnecessary repairs. You’ll get a detailed estimate before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and stays current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates with no hidden fees. You approve all work before we start.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs completed same-day. We respect your time and schedule.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: All parts and labor come with a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: I took my car for a state inspection and they found a minor issue. They fixed it quickly and didn't charge an arm and a leg. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: Honest mechanics who actually explain what's wrong. They saved me hundreds compared to the dealership.

testimonials.quote: Fast oil change and they checked my tires and fluids without being asked. Great customer service.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online. We’ll take care of the rest.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of auto repair and state inspection services for all makes and models. Our Dallas shop is equipped with advanced diagnostics and staffed by experienced technicians who prioritize your safety and satisfaction.

services.title: State Inspections
services.shortDescription: Official Texas vehicle inspections – fast, thorough, and fair.
services.longDescription: Our certified inspection station handles all Texas state inspections, including safety and emissions. We check brakes, lights, tires, steering, suspension, and more. If your vehicle fails, we explain the issues and offer affordable repairs to get you back on the road quickly.

process.title: Check-In
process.description: Drive in or schedule an appointment. We’ll take your vehicle information and begin the inspection.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Our certified inspector performs a comprehensive check of all required safety and emissions components.

process.title: Results
process.description: You receive a detailed report. If you pass, we issue your sticker. If not, we provide a repair estimate.

faqs.question: How long does a state inspection take?
faqs.answer: Typically 20-30 minutes, depending on vehicle condition and wait times.

faqs.question: What if my car fails the inspection?
faqs.answer: We’ll explain what failed and provide a repair quote. Once fixed, we’ll reinspect at no extra charge.

services.title: Brake Repair
services.shortDescription: Stop safely with professional brake service.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle’s most important safety feature. We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines. Using quality parts, we restore stopping power and ensure your safety.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We test your brakes and measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the findings and recommend necessary repairs with a transparent estimate.

process.title: Service
process.description: Our technicians replace worn components and test the system to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, a soft pedal, or longer stopping distances are signs. We recommend an inspection every 10,000 miles.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM or aftermarket parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality aftermarket parts that meet or exceed OEM standards, backed by a warranty.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint and fix engine issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car runs rough, our advanced diagnostic tools identify the problem quickly. We repair everything from sensor replacements to major engine work, always with upfront pricing.

process.title: Scan
process.description: We connect our diagnostic scanner to read error codes and live data from your engine computer.

process.title: Analysis
process.description: Our technician interprets the data and performs additional tests to confirm the root cause.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We provide a detailed estimate and complete the repair using quality parts, then clear the codes and test drive.

faqs.question: What does a diagnostic test cost?
faqs.answer: Our diagnostic fee is $89, which is applied to any repairs we perform.

faqs.question: Can you fix any check engine light code?
faqs.answer: We can diagnose and repair most issues. Some rare problems may require specialized equipment, but we’ll refer you if needed.

services.title: Oil Change & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the best way to extend your engine’s life. We use quality oil and filters, and include a complimentary multi-point inspection to catch potential issues early.
benefits: Includes fluid top-off and tire pressure check

process.title: Arrival
process.description: Pull in or schedule an appointment. We’ll note your vehicle and oil preferences.

process.title: Service
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with your choice of oil. We also inspect belts, hoses, and fluids.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We reset your oil life monitor, provide a sticker with next service date, and review inspection findings.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need oil every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner’s manual or ask us.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oil to match your vehicle’s requirements.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Auto Repair Shop in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair and state inspections that keep our community safe and moving.
story: State Inspection Auto Repair opened its doors in 2005 with a simple mission: offer reliable car care without the dealership markup. Founded by a team of ASE-certified mechanics, we’ve grown from a small two-bay shop to a full-service repair center serving Dallas drivers from Lake Highlands to Pleasant Grove.

Over the years, we’ve invested in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training for our technicians. But our core values remain the same: transparency, quality workmanship, and treating every customer like a neighbor. Whether you need a quick oil change or a major engine repair, you can count on us to get it right.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our estimates are honest and detailed.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and employ skilled technicians who take pride in their work.

coreValues.title: Convenience
coreValues.description: Fast turnaround, easy scheduling, and a comfortable waiting area.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local events and treat every customer like family.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We’re here to help with all your auto repair needs.
